Description: Encoded PowerShell spawned from a Node package manager child process on a developer workstation.
RemediationSteps: Isolate device; collect process and script artifacts; review recent package installs.

Description: Process initiated HTTPS connection to a recently registered domain used by third-party package mirrors.
RemediationSteps: Validate package source; block domain if unapproved; inspect staging directory.

DisplayName: Suspicious child process from script interpreter
AlertName: Suspicious child process from script interpreter
Description: cmd.exe launched powershell.exe with execution policy bypass following npm lifecycle script.
RemediationSteps: Review npm package integrity; compare package hash to known-good registry.

DisplayName: Unusual volume of SharePoint file downloads
AlertName: Unusual volume of SharePoint file downloads
Description: User downloaded multiple files from a project site within a short interval including labeled content.
RemediationSteps: Verify business justification; confirm sensitivity label handling; assess DLP outcomes.

DisplayName: Anomalous postinstall script during package install
AlertName: Anomalous postinstall script during package install
Description: Package manager executed lifecycle script invoking shell interpreter not typical for this project profile.
RemediationSteps: Quarantine package cache; rebuild node_modules from lockfile; scan staging folder.

DisplayName: Email reported with embedded link to external SaaS trial
AlertName: Email reported with embedded link to external SaaS trial
Description: User reported message promoting third-party AI development assistant trial with external registration URL.
RemediationSteps: Review message headers and URL reputation; user awareness if benign marketing.

DisplayName: Multiple downloads of customer analytics content
AlertName: Multiple downloads of customer analytics content
Description: Several files with Customer Data sensitivity label accessed from developer endpoint session.
RemediationSteps: Coordinate with data owner; evaluate breach reporting threshold per data handling policy.
ExtendedProperties: {"Labels":["Customer Data","Internal"],"PolicyNote":"Approved project membership not verified in alert"}

Description: Interactive sign-in observed from IP geolocated outside user's typical pattern.
RemediationSteps: Validate sign-in with user; review MFA and CA outcomes.
ExtendedProperties: {"SessionId":"sess-jv-0701-aa11","Explainable":"Corporate VPN egress documented in Status field"}

Description: Sign-in from geographically distant locations within a short time.

DisplayName: Software update activity for supported IDE
AlertName: Software update activity for supported IDE
Description: Signed update binary contacted vendor CDN for version manifest.

DisplayName: npm registry cache refresh on peer developer host
AlertName: npm registry cache refresh on peer developer host
Description: Routine package metadata fetch on separate device in Engineering machine group.
Expected developer workflow invoking git-credential-manager-core for Azure DevOps.

DisplayName: Failed sign-in for disabled former contractor account
AlertName: Failed sign-in for disabled former contractor account
Description: Sign-in failure for account marked disabled in Entra ID.
RemediationSteps: Monitor for password spray; no linkage to active incident.

Description: Package restore for internal API solution using standard NuGet feed.
